comments.text: Spun out of mutagen-ua9 during delivery of mutagen-33b. Found by the mutagen-33b.6 capstone full e2e run: test/mutagen_ex/golden/end_to_end_scenario_5_baseline_red.json is stale vs the baseline-red details map threaded through in mutagen-wrd.39.2 — actual details now carry message:"baseline: N test failure(s) before any mutation" + nested warnings:{count:0}; the committed golden lacks them. Producing code lib/mutagen_ex/baseline.ex:238 (long-standing). NOT mutagen-33b-attributable. Regenerate via: REGEN=1 mix test test/mutagen_ex/end_to_end_test.exs --only e2e_slow, review diff, commit.

title: Stale golden: end_to_end_scenario_5_baseline_red.json (details message + warnings drift)
